_comment: Claude Code settings 示例 —— 复制到 ~/.claude/settings.json 并替换 <...> 占位符。
_comment_en: Claude Code settings example — copy into ~/.claude/settings.json and replace <...> placeholders.

env._comment_secret: 可选：启用了签名校验的机器人，填上它的 SEC 密钥。
env._comment_secret_en: Optional: if the bot enforces signature verification, set its SEC secret.

hooks._comment_path: 改成你实际的 feishu-notify.js 绝对路径
hooks._comment_path_en: Replace with the absolute path to your feishu-notify.js
